lane.title: 10 Packaging Design
lane.last_task: Initialize lane and verify NCH flask review state
lane.last_summary: Re-read packaging-design lane memory, packaging prompt, Claude execution digest, marketing graph state, creative asset library registry, and decisions log. Confirmed repo checkout is on claude/captain-pos-guard with unrelated dirty tracked work, so no repo edit/stage is safe from this lane. Figma file cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey is readable/writable through use_figma and contains page 197:2 'Codex Final 250ml Front Back Editable' with locked front, locked back v5, editable back v6, and Gemini concept frames. Downloaded/visually inspected review screenshot at /private/tmp/nch_figma_review_page_20260528.png. Source front and back v5 PDFs qpdf-clean and both page size 385.512 x 612.283 pt (136x216mm). QR PNGs decode: WhatsApp dynamic to https://nawabichaihouse.com/go/flask and Google review to https://g.page/r/CQozT6UxiKIGEBM/review. Live check shows /go/flask currently returns the NCH homepage, not a dedicated flask/claim WhatsApp redirect, and homepage links point to wa.me/918008002045 while print art says +91 74832 70215.
lane.next_action: Before vendor-final output, either fix/verify the /go/flask route to the intended flask claim WhatsApp destination and confirm phone/legal/FSSAI text, or have Nihaf explicitly approve keeping the homepage route. After approval, adjust editable back v6 placements if needed, then run final deterministic SVG/PDF/QR/bleed/dieline vendor checks.
lane.mutation_status: Read-only verification and memory writeback only; no Figma mutation, no repo mutation, no POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/vendor final file mutation, no bulk dielines.
lane.proof: Figma page 197:2 verified via use_figma; screenshot /private/tmp/nch_figma_review_page_20260528.png; qpdf/pdfinfo passed for front and back v5 print PDFs; zbarimg decoded both QR PNGs; curl -I -L confirmed Google review resolves to write-review page and /go/flask returns 200 homepage.
lane.live_ids: Figma file cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey; review page 197:2; locked front frame 197:5; locked back v5 frame 197:6; editable back v6 frame 197:7; Gemini reference frame 197:8; NCH /go/flask URL; Google review URL g.page/r/CQozT6UxiKIGEBM/review
lane.data_freshness: Verified 2026-05-28 IST from local files, Figma MCP, qpdf/pdfinfo/zbarimg, and curl live checks.

recent_events.task: Build NCH flask front/back editable Figma review board
recent_events.summary: Ingested updated packaging-design context and built a self-contained Figma approval page in existing file cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey. Locked approved front reference and v5 back reference are nested into their frames. Editable back v6 frame now contains matched embroidered background, larger emblem, dual QR cards, Instagram/website/phone/statutory text, divider, and dark footer band. Source front/back PDFs still qpdf pass at 136x216mm; source QR PNGs decode to /go/flask and Google review. No final vendor dieline bulk generation done before approval.
recent_events.next_action: Have Nihaf review page 'Codex Final 250ml Front Back Editable' in Figma, adjust editable back placements if needed, then run deterministic SVG/PDF/QR/bleed/dieline vendor checks after panel approval.
recent_events.mutation_status: Existing Figma file mutation only; no POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/vendor final file mutation; no bulk final dielines generated.

recent_events.task: Audit Figma MCP control for NCH flask file
recent_events.summary: Confirmed existing Figma flask file cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey is accessible and writable: metadata read for node 1:7, created Codex MCP Control Test page/nodes, uploaded a PNG as a new Figma image node, exported screenshots and downloaded them. New blank file creation failed earlier due invalid planKey; direct upload-to-existing-node fill did not apply, but upload-as-new-node works and can be positioned/resized by use_figma.
recent_events.next_action: Build final front/back editable panels inside existing NCH flask Figma file using existing page/node 1:7; use supported Figma fonts like Cinzel/Cormorant/Inter and upload raster references as new image nodes.
recent_events.mutation_status: Figma test page and uploaded test image node only; no POS/Odoo/ad/vendor mutation.

recent_events.task: Refine NCH 250ml flask back aesthetic with Gemini-guided dual QR system
recent_events.summary: Built v5 Gemini-refined NCH 250ml flask back production candidate at /Users/nihaf/Downloads/NCH_Flask_Back_Production_2026-05-25_v5_GeminiRefined: larger NCH emblem, simplified premium hierarchy, WhatsApp dynamic QR plus Google review QR, Instagram identity line, dark sepia legal footer, front-matched kraft/border system, and Gemini nano-banana-pro-preview concept reference. Verified qpdf, PDF page size 136x216mm, and zbar decoding of both QRs.
recent_events.next_action: Confirm phone/legal/FSSAI and live /go/flask redirect, then assemble front+back into full 250ml vendor dieline with side/gable panels.
recent_events.mutation_status: Created local print/proof assets and Gemini concept only; no POS/Odoo/ad/vendor mutation.
